slide1.content: I confirm that:  I have had the opportunity to ask questions and have received satisfactory answers.I understand the information provided to me. I am voluntarily consenting to the proposed treatment or procedure.I understand that I may withdraw my consent at any time before the procedure, where medically appropriate.

slide2.content: I understand:The type of anesthesia to be administered.The risks and possible complications associated with anesthesia.That the anesthesiologist has explained the procedure and answered my questions.
I understand:A blood transfusion may be necessary. The benefits and risks of receiving blood or blood products.The available alternatives, where applicable.

slide3.content: I understand: I understand that my personal and medical information will be collected, used, stored, and disclosed in accordance with applicable privacy laws and hospital policies for the purpose of providing medical care.

slide4.content: I acknowledge that: I have received information regarding estimated costs, where applicable. I am responsible for charges not covered by insurance or other payment arrangements.** I have read and understood this consent form. I voluntarily consent to the proposed treatment or procedure.
